payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a raised-panel design and visible wood grain, occupying most of the crop and cut off at the left and top edges; a partial round knob is visible at the left edge—appears to be an upper kitchen/wardrobe cabinet approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
